issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: reactive-counter-component
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses #[component], create_signal, set_count.update with the view! macro per skill; baseline approximates a generic Rust component with wrong macro shape.

scenarios.name: server-function-data-fetch
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly applies #[server(GetPosts, "/api")], create_resource, and <Suspense fallback=...> per skill; baseline writes a hand-rolled fetch endpoint missing Leptos's isomorphic server-fn pattern.
